_schema.doc: X-space accounting (BuyLog Step 3, p.11-63) + accessory X-space (11-61/62 footnotes) + XT1 grouping rule + XT1 mounting-rail SKUs by orientation (11-65/66).
_schema.frame_xspace: X-spaces consumed by ONE breaker of a given frame, keyed by frame then pole-count (string). null = TODO transcribe / verify.
_schema.main_lug_pad_xspace: X-spaces per MLO lug-pad set; also added to a vertical main breaker (rule #3).
_schema.xt5_accessory_extra: extra X-spaces when an XT5 carries electrical accessories (rule #4, 11-62 footnote).
_schema.accessory_xspace: X-spaces for plug-in accessory modules that occupy bus positions.
_schema.xt1_grouping: non-linear XT1 X-space: 1->3X, 2->5X, 5->11X; bin_order = greedy fill order to MINIMIZE total X.
_schema.xt1_rails: rail SKU per group size, by orientation family. SuperBox SKUs name their family in superbox.json (rail_orientation).

frame_xspace._source: Step 3 table, p.11-63 (confirmed from clean scan).

accessory_xspace._note: SPD plug-in = 10X and RGM40 meter = 4X per the p.11-62 device-page footnotes (confirmed by user). RELT 3X (p.11-61 fn4 / Step 3 table). NOTE: the Step 3 table (p.11-63) prints SPD = 6X, which is a BuyLog inconsistency; 10X governs.

xt1_rails.doc: Mounting rails are NOT included in the SuperBox and must be ordered as their own BOM line. The merchandised SuperBox uses the BF family (SR1XBF/SR2XBF/SR5XBF) per the Step 2 SuperBox accessories table (p.11-61). The BR variants are for non-SuperBox generic Tmax/SB mounting (nomenclature p.11-65/66) and are kept here for reference only.
